narratives.Overview: Eliminate the React/Turbopack warning "The result of getServerSnapshot should be cached to avoid an infinite loop" surfaced via NoisePlayer.tsx. The break-tallies and todos server-snapshot getters construct a fresh object/array on every call, so React sees a new reference each render during SSR/hydration. Return referentially-stable module-level constants instead.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: getBreakTalliesServerSnapshot returns a stable, frozen module-level BreakTallies constant (same reference across calls). FR-2: getTodosServerSnapshot returns a stable, frozen module-level empty TodoItem[] constant (same reference across calls). FR-3: Client get*Snapshot getters continue to return a cached reference that changes only when the store mutates (already the case; verified). NFR-1: Getters remain pure and side-effect free. NFR-2: No behavioral change to tallies, daily goal, or todos values. NFR-3: >=85% per-file coverage on src/lib preserved; add tests asserting repeated get*Snapshot()/get*ServerSnapshot() calls return the same reference when unchanged and a fresh reference after mutation.

items.title: Return frozen module-level constant from getBreakTalliesServerSnapshot
Return frozen module-level constant from getTodosServerSnapshot
Add referential-stability unit tests for snapshot getters
